::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div class="quarto-title-block">
::: {.callout-note title="v1.1.1 Note"}

This site presents the `v1.1.1` release of the dissertation. Like `v1.1`, the `v1.1.1` pass corrects identified errata and render issues without adding new data or introducing new analyses. Its most substantive correction is the reversed direction of the recall reliance comparison ($H_{2b}$); it also corrects a misprinted OEE difference, the description of the complementary bootstrap (a replication-seeding error), an $H_{3b}$ coefficient-rescaling error, and a set of transparency, editorial, and bibliographic items. None changes a hypothesis determination. The exact changes are recorded in @sec-v1-1-changelog. A PDF of the as-defended dissertation can be downloaded from the [baseline release notes page](https://github.com/olearydj/au_diss/releases/tag/baseline%2Fdissertation-defended-2024-08-02). The project repository and source are public [on GitHub](https://github.com/olearydj/au_diss).
:::

<p>A dissertation submitted to the Graduate Faculty of Auburn University in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of Doctor of Philosophy</p>

<p><strong>Approved Aug 3, 2024 by</strong></p>

<ul>
<li>Dr. John Evans, Co-chair, Professor, Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</li>
<li>Dr. Gregory Harris, Co-chair, Professor &amp; Chair, Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</li>
<li>Dr. Richard Sesek, Professor, Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</li>
<li>Dr. Konstantinos Mykoniatis, Assistant Professor, Industrial &amp; Systems Engineering</li>
</ul>
</div>
:::

# Abstract {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\enlargethispage{\baselineskip}
```
:::

{{< include _front/12-abstract.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\newpage

\hypertarget{acknowledgements}{\chapter*{Acknowledgements}\label{acknowledgements}}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Acknowledgements}
```

{{< include _front/13-acknowledgements.qmd >}}

<!-- Moved here from toc.tex -->
```{=latex}
\RedeclareSectionCommand[beforeskip=0pt, afterskip=48pt]{chapter}

\tableofcontents
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Table of Contents}

\listoftables
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{List of Tables}

\listoffigures
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{List of Figures}

\RedeclareSectionCommand[beforeskip=0pt, afterskip=24pt]{chapter}
\mainmatter
```

<!-- {{< include 14-acronyms.qmd >}} -->

:::
